title: Postabortion Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Postabortion Counseling 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details ALL-OPTIONS ALL-OPTIONS TALKLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a confidential space to talk about pregnancy, parenting, abortion, and adoption. Peer counselors offer judgment-free support at any point before, during, and after pregnancy, regardless of which options the caller is considering. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-10pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-3pm Email (888) 493-0092 Visit Website More Details PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides pregnancy tests and pregnancy options information. Services include prenatal, parenting, and life skills education and support, maternity clothing, baby clothing, toddler clothing, and diapers. Offers a weekly parent/child playgroup, and monthly parent lunch group. Provides miscarriage support, support after abortion, and connections to local resources. Does not provide referrals to abortion services. 475 Laurel Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm, 4pm-7pm by appointment only Email (541) 902-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER
